requirement_topic.en: EPRA Licensing, Grid Connection, and Mini-Grid Review
requirement_topic.zh: EPRA许可、并网和微电网审查
requirement_topic.zht: EPRA許可、併網和微電網審查

summary.en: EPRA is the Kenya energy regulator for electricity and renewable-energy licensing, regulatory instruments, application guidelines, license applications, and registers. A BESS used as part of generation, distribution, grid support, a mini-grid, or a customer project may need EPRA, utility, county, environmental, or project approvals depending on ownership model, capacity, location, grid connection, and whether electricity is sold or supplied to third parties.
summary.zh: EPRA是肯尼亚电力和可再生能源许可、监管文件、申请指南、许可申请和登记册的能源监管机构。作为发电、配电、电网支撑、微电网或客户项目组成部分的BESS，可能需要EPRA、公用事业单位、县级、环境或项目批准，具体取决于所有权模式、容量、地点、并网方式以及是否向第三方售电或供电。
summary.zht: EPRA是肯亞電力和可再生能源許可、監管文件、申請指南、許可申請和登記冊的能源監管機構。作為發電、配電、電網支撐、微電網或客戶項目組成部分的BESS，可能需要EPRA、公用事業單位、郡級、環境或項目批准，具體取決於所有權模式、容量、地點、併網方式以及是否向第三方售電或供電。

standards_or_laws: EPRA electricity regulatory instruments and licensing routes
EPRA renewable-energy regulatory instruments and licensing routes
Applicable grid-code, mini-grid, environmental, county, and project approvals

summary.en: China-side BESS factory certificates, grid simulation reports, commissioning records, and GB / GB/T reports can support technical review but do not establish Kenya electricity licensing, mini-grid approval, grid interconnection, tariff, land, environmental, or operating approval.
summary.zh: 中国侧BESS工厂证书、并网仿真报告、调试记录及GB/GB/T报告可支持技术审查，但不能确立肯尼亚电力许可、微电网批准、并网、上网电价、土地、环境或运营批准。
summary.zht: 中國側BESS工廠證書、併網仿真報告、調試記錄及GB／GB/T報告可支持技術審查，但不能確立肯亞電力許可、微電網批准、併網、上網電價、土地、環境或營運批准。

standards_or_laws: Project-specific China grid and commissioning evidence

gap.en: Separate product import compliance from project authorization. For Kenya projects, prepare a regulatory memo showing whether the BESS is behind-the-meter, grid-connected, mini-grid, generation-integrated, distribution-connected, or stand-alone, and identify the EPRA, utility, county, environmental, land, fire, and contract approvals required before commissioning.
gap.zh: 应区分产品进口合规与项目授权。对于肯尼亚项目，应准备监管备忘录，说明BESS是表后、并网、微电网、发电侧集成、配电侧接入还是独立系统，并识别投运前所需的EPRA、公用事业单位、县级、环境、土地、消防和合同批准。
gap.zht: 應區分產品進口合規與項目授權。對於肯亞項目，應準備監管備忘錄，說明BESS是錶後、併網、微電網、發電側整合、配電側接入還是獨立系統，並識別投運前所需的EPRA、公用事業單位、郡級、環境、土地、消防和合約批准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the BESS activity falls within Kenya electricity / renewable-energy licensing, grid, mini-grid, sale-of-electricity, or project-approval requirements; not a universal standalone product certificate
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic project approvals and grid evidence are not substitutes for Kenya EPRA / utility / project approvals

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EPRA and utility review should be scoped by the Kenya project use case; product-level PVoC or IEC evidence does not by itself authorize a grid-connected or mini-grid BESS project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EPRA和公用事业单位审查应按肯尼亚项目用途确定；产品级PVoC或IEC证据本身不能授权并网或微电网BESS项目。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EPRA和公用事業單位審查應按肯亞項目用途確定；產品級PVoC或IEC證據本身不能授權併網或微電網BESS項目。
